sentences.translationEn: Nour went to the post office.

sentences.arabic: أَرَادَتْ أَنْ تُرْسِلَ طَرْدًا إِلَى أُمِّهَا.
sentences.translationEn: She wanted to send a package to her mother.

sentences.translation: Službenik ju je pitao o sadržaju paketa.
sentences.translationEn: The employee asked her about the package contents.
She answered and paid the fees.
She took the receipt and left.
